articles.title: World Cup Round of 32 live updates: Canada stuns South Africa to advance plus latest results and news - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Canada is through, and the World Cup knockout stage is underway. Follow along here for the latest Round of 32 results, schedule updates, highlights and news ...
articles.content:
The World Cup knockout stage has arrived.
After 17 days of group stage drama, the 2026 tournament shifts Sunday to the Round of 32, where every match is now win-or-go-home. And in the first eliminat… [+5102 chars]
